## Grading Guide

Grades run from 0.0 to 1.0.

| Grade | Meaning |
|-------|---------|
| 1.0 | Target achieved or exceeded |
| 0.7 | Significant progress — strong outcome despite falling short |
| 0.5 | Partial progress — meaningful work done |
| 0.3 | Early stage or blocked |
| 0.0 | No progress |

**What 1.0 looks like for this period:**  
{{ what_full_grade_looks_like }}

**What 0.7 looks like for this period:**  
{{ what_acceptable_grade_looks_like }}
